verdict: AI displacement risk: moderate, with a potential for significant disruption in the next 5 years.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine Cognitive Tasks
reasoning_steps.body: Graphic designers perform tasks like keying information into computer equipment, reviewing layouts, and generating new images using computer software. These tasks are increasingly automated by AI-powered design tools.

reasoning_steps.title: Creative Judgment
reasoning_steps.body: While graphic designers have some creative freedom, their work is heavily influenced by layout principles and esthetic design concepts. AI can generate designs, but human judgment is still essential for selecting style and size of type.

evidence_ledger.contribution: Provides a comprehensive list of tasks performed by graphic designers, highlighting the routine cognitive tasks that are susceptible to automation.
Confirms the importance of creative judgment and human expertise in graphic design, which is less likely to be automated by AI.

adjacent_careers.name: UI/UX Designer
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Both graphic designers and UI/UX designers focus on visual communication, but UI/UX designers tend to work more closely with developers and have a stronger emphasis on user experience.

adjacent_careers.name: Digital Artist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Graphic designers and digital artists share some similarities in their creative tasks, but digital artists tend to focus more on artistic expression and less on commercial applications.

recent_developments.headline: Generative tools enter mainstream creative pipelines
recent_developments.impact: Studios and agencies use AI for ideation, layout, voice, and music drafts — finals still human-finished.

recent_developments.headline: Stock-image and stock-music markets compress
recent_developments.impact: AI-generated assets are taking share from libraries that once monetized routine creative output.

recent_developments.headline: Provenance standards (C2PA) gain industry backing
recent_developments.impact: Major platforms and cameras commit to content credentials so human-made work can be marked as such.

quotes.quote: I am utterly disgusted. This is an insult to life itself.
quotes.speaker: Hayao Miyazaki
quotes.title: Co-founder, Studio Ghibli

quotes.quote: AI is a tool. It will not replace artists. It will replace artists who do not learn to use AI as a tool.
quotes.speaker: Refik Anadol
quotes.title: Media artist

quotes.quote: Generative tools collapse the cost of producing a draft to near zero. The differentiator becomes taste, judgment, and knowing what is worth making at all.
quotes.speaker: John Maeda
quotes.title: Designer; VP of Design and AI, Microsoft
